title: afzelia palembanica
intro: Afzelia palembanica, also known as the Palembang ironwood or kempas tree, is a species of tree native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. The bark, roots, and leaves of Afzelia palembanica have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Afzelia palembanica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often used to make tea, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
